title: WTHM's Serverpack
description:
We The Horsemen's official server pack

We will be using this modpack on our servers to enhance the vanilla experience. Please keep an eye out for updates and our change logs as we add more content throughout our Minecraft server's season.
body:
# We The Horsemen's official server pack

We will be using this modpack on our servers to enhance the vanilla experience. Please keep an eye out for updates and our change logs as we add more content throughout our Minecraft server's season.

Our modpack features a lot of visual and audio changes to the game to allow for a more impressive feel. We have also added in-game voice chat support along with some QOL mods, which can be toggled on or off with the mod menu.

Along with this, we will be adding some cosmetic mods and blocks, as well as new challenges, to help the game feel more challenging and future-proof.

Thank you for joining us on our minecraft advanture :D
